features: Brow-Renewing Serum - This eyebrow serum is formulated to help reduce visible hair shedding and loss by rejuvenating elastin, the protein that anchors hair, promoting thicker, fuller, more shapely looking brows.
New Optimized Tube - This limited edition clear tube is redesigned to elevate your BROW serum experience. A wider opening improves brush saturation and the clear tube ensures fill capacity.

Scientifically Studied - Our results have been clinically tested throughout numerous scientific trials. In a 12-week clinical study, after using this eyebrow serum participants experienced up to a 60% increase in the appearance of brow density and thickness.*

How to Use - If you want to use this brow serum to promote thicker-looking brows, begin by brushing the formula onto clean, dry brows and skin where results are desired. Use a back-and-forth motion for more coverage. Apply twice daily, and reduce to once when desired look is achieved.

Real Science for Real Results - Nulastin's groundbreaking science is rooted in elastin replenishment for hair enhancement. Our clinically proven formulas range from advanced eyelash serums to scalp care, delivering visibly transformative results.
ingredients: Water (Aqua), Myristoyl Pentapeptide-17, Glycerin, sh-Polypeptide-50 (Elastin), Keratin, Carbomer, Sodium Phytate, Sodium Phosphate, Sodium Chloride, sh-Polypeptide-62, (+)-Cloprostenol Isopropyl Ester, Sodium Hydroxide, Phenoxyethanol
parentTitle: NULASTIN Eyebrow Serum for Thicker Looking Brows - BROW Shape Altering Serum
title: NULASTIN Shape Altering Eyebrow Serum - Brow Serum to Shape & Define - Improves the Appearance of Sparse Eyebrows for a Fuller Look - Enriched with Hair-Strengthening Ingredients (2 Count)
